skills.name: user-story-and-use-case-builder
skills.summary: Builds user stories, use cases, alternate flows, and exception paths from an approved requirement baseline.

skills.name: business-rule-modeler
skills.summary: Models validations, calculations, eligibility rules, temporal rules, invariants, and decision tables.

skills.name: domain-entity-value-object-modeler
skills.summary: Models aggregates, entities, value objects, identities, invariants, and lifecycle boundaries.

skills.name: bounded-context-candidate-builder
skills.summary: Proposes bounded contexts and context relationships from language, rules, ownership, and change patterns.

skills.name: domain-event-command-query-modeler
skills.summary: Models commands, queries, domain events, integration events, handlers, and causality.

skills.name: workflow-and-state-machine-modeler
skills.summary: Builds workflows, state machines, transitions, guards, timers, compensations, and terminal outcomes.

skills.name: data-dictionary-builder
skills.summary: Builds canonical data definitions, classifications, units, formats, retention, and ownership metadata.

skills.name: api-contract-draft-builder
skills.summary: Drafts language-neutral REST, RPC, event, webhook, and batch interface contracts from approved behavior.

skills.name: permission-matrix-builder
skills.summary: Builds roles, permissions, resource scopes, conditions, segregation-of-duty rules, and administrative boundaries.

skills.name: requirement-traceability-graph
skills.summary: Builds the complete trace graph from requirements to stories, rules, domain elements, workflows, APIs, permissions, and tests.

skills.name: architecture-style-selector
skills.summary: Selects and ranks architecture styles using quality attributes, domain shape, delivery constraints, and team fit.

skills.name: system-context-container-planner
skills.summary: Creates system-context and container-level architecture views.

skills.name: module-and-service-decomposer
skills.summary: Decomposes bounded contexts into modules, services, libraries, workers, and adapters.

skills.name: quality-attribute-tradeoff-analyzer
skills.summary: Evaluates architecture decisions against performance, availability, security, maintainability, cost, and delivery speed.

skills.name: data-ownership-consistency-planner
skills.summary: Plans data ownership, transaction boundaries, consistency levels, replication, caching, and lifecycle responsibilities.

skills.name: sync-async-communication-planner
skills.summary: Chooses synchronous, asynchronous, streaming, batch, callback, and file-exchange communication patterns.

skills.name: resilience-and-failure-mode-planner
skills.summary: Plans retries, circuit breaking, bulkheads, graceful degradation, recovery, replay, and failure observability.

skills.name: security-and-threat-model-planner
skills.summary: Builds the architecture threat model and maps threats to controls, trust boundaries, abuse cases, and verification.

skills.name: multitenancy-topology-planner
skills.summary: Plans tenant isolation, identity propagation, data partitioning, noisy-neighbor protection, and tenant lifecycle.

skills.name: observability-architecture-planner
skills.summary: Plans logs, metrics, traces, audits, correlation, dashboards, alerts, SLOs, and diagnostic retention.

skills.name: deployment-topology-planner
skills.summary: Plans environments, regions, compute, network, storage, scaling, rollout, backup, and disaster recovery topology.

skills.name: adr-and-architecture-review-pack
skills.summary: Compiles architecture decisions, diagrams, risks, tradeoffs, open issues, and review gates into an approval package.

skills.name: application-profile-selector
skills.summary: Selects project shapes such as API, modular monolith, worker, CLI, batch, event processor, desktop, or full stack.

skills.name: language-framework-profile-selector
skills.summary: Selects language, framework, persistence, messaging, API, testing, and observability profiles.

skills.name: runtime-version-policy-resolver
skills.summary: Resolves runtime, SDK, compiler, framework, operating-system, database, and container versions.

skills.name: dependency-catalog-and-bom-planner
skills.summary: Creates approved dependency catalogs, BOMs, lock strategies, repositories, licenses, and vulnerability policies.

skills.name: repository-layout-planner
skills.summary: Plans repository roots, applications, modules, libraries, tests, docs, deployment assets, and generated areas.

skills.name: namespace-and-package-planner
skills.summary: Plans namespaces, packages, modules, project names, artifact identifiers, and naming conventions.

skills.name: build-system-planner
skills.summary: Plans build tools, project graph, tasks, wrappers, caching, packaging, and reproducible build behavior.

skills.name: environment-configuration-planner
skills.summary: Plans configuration keys, defaults, environment overlays, feature flags, secrets, and local development dependencies.

skills.name: code-style-and-quality-profile
skills.summary: Defines formatting, linting, typing, analyzers, warnings, complexity, coverage, and generated-code exemptions.

skills.name: project-blueprint-compiler
skills.summary: Compiles approved requirements and architecture into the canonical machine-readable Project Blueprint.

skills.name: template-registry
skills.summary: Registers reusable project, module, file, test, configuration, deployment, and documentation templates.

skills.name: template-signing-and-provenance
skills.summary: Signs templates and records source, publisher, review, dependencies, license, and content lineage.

skills.name: semantic-code-model
skills.summary: Defines the language-neutral semantic model for projects, modules, types, members, dependencies, behavior, tests, and annotations.

skills.name: scaffold-composer
skills.summary: Composes repositories, applications, modules, directories, baseline files, tests, docs, and deployment roots.

skills.name: ast-cst-code-emitter
skills.summary: Emits compilable target-language source through AST/CST-aware writers and language adapters.

skills.name: configuration-file-emitter
skills.summary: Generates build, runtime, dependency, formatter, linter, container, CI, and environment configuration files.

skills.name: generated-file-ownership
skills.summary: Assigns managed, protected, user-owned, imported, and derived ownership modes to files and symbols.

skills.name: protected-region-and-extension-point
skills.summary: Defines protected source regions, partial types, interfaces, hooks, plugins, callbacks, and generated extension contracts.

skills.name: idempotent-generation-engine
skills.summary: Executes deterministic generation plans without duplicating semantic artifacts or creating unstable diffs.

skills.name: incremental-merge-engine
skills.summary: Performs AST/CST-aware, ownership-aware, and history-aware merges between generated intent and repository state.

skills.name: formatter-linter-normalizer
skills.summary: Formats, lints, type-checks, normalizes, and statically validates generated artifacts using pinned toolchains.

skills.name: generation-manifest-and-sbom
skills.summary: Publishes the generation manifest, artifact inventory, provenance, ownership, dependencies, tools, and software bill of materials.
